reviews.review_description:
This is an education-first app, not a game, and thus my original review is of little relevance and without context. I have modified this since meta doesn't let us simply delete reviews like every other app store that has ever been made.

Try the app! You might like it! 
The star count does not reflect my opinion of my experience.

Newton's Room with its intuitively designed elements, not only captures the exhilarating essence of exploring a children’s museum but also fosters a sense of wonder and discovery. Each feature is crafted to encourage curiosity and learning. The way the objects seamlessly interact with your environment is mesmerizing, creating an almost magical atmosphere that invites continuous discovery. It’s a digital playground that stimulates the mind and ignites the imagination, making each session a memorable adventure.
Really fun experience using the app.
A good understanding of newton in a practical way. Good for education use in Mixed Reality.
Newton’s Room is a great example of mixed reality applied to learning.
Really fun to use your room environment to solve challenges
This is a great use case for Mixed Reality. Well done Horacio and team!

reviews.review_title: First fully Mixed Reality education app
reviews.review_description: Newton's Room brings a next generation of educational experience through Mixed Reality. This app is the first fully mixed reality educational experience on the Meta Quest Store. Have fun learning physics in your room.
The sandbox feature let’s you experiment with your environment in mixed reality

I can't recommend this app enough.  This is perfect for visualising and demonstrating Newton's Laws of Physics in a fun and engaging way.

Newton’s Room is an incredible mixed reality app that makes learning physics both fun and educational through engaging  puzzles. The 
emphasis on the creative application of Newton’s laws ensures a unique and challenging experience. Its interactive nature and adaptive challenges make it perfect for enhancing physics knowledge while enjoying a good puzzle.

I've used this in educational settings with colleagues and with friends at home and all have been captivated by it!
This is one of the best Mixed Reality apps available.
Can't believe this is free. Very few games take real advantage of Mixed Reality, this one does and it makes learning more fun. Highly recommended as a first VR/AR experience!
Fun app to learn Newton’s Laws of physics.
Love the design of the app; it's truly impressive. Not only is it visually appealing, but it also conveys a sense of elegance and simplicity that greatly enhances my user experience.
